step.title: Load test suite and baseline metrics
step.action: Load test suite and run tests to get baseline metrics: pass/fail counts, execution time, coverage.
If test plan or coverage report exists, load them for additional context.

step.title: Analyze test quality
step.action: Analyze test quality: naming conventions, structure, assertion patterns, test isolation.
Score each quality dimension and compute an overall Quality Score.

step.title: Identify flaky tests
step.action: Identify flaky tests by analyzing test history, timing-dependent logic, and shared state.
Document root causes for each flaky test found.

step.title: Assess coverage effectiveness
step.action: Assess coverage effectiveness beyond line coverage: branch coverage, path coverage, mutation testing potential.
Identify areas with high line coverage but low meaningful coverage.

step.title: Generate improvement recommendations
step.action: Generate improvement recommendations prioritized by impact on test reliability and coverage.

step.title: Produce test review report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with test review findings.
